title: Hearthlit Brazing Volcano retiring from PR 115 watch
body: Hearthlit Brazing Volcano retirement announcement. Owner directed wind-down: oak-session-handoff and bounded oak-consolidate-docs have run; PR 115 watcher handoff is updated at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-hearthlit-pr-115-watch-handoff.md. No remote PR poll was performed during wind-down; the watch goal remains incomplete until PR 115 is merged. I have no retained claim and am opening no further work from this seat. Stopping after asking Fiery to commit the handoff and retirement residue.
